Untitled

2026-05-23

library(aTSA)
## 
## Attaching package: 'aTSA'
## The following object is masked from 'package:graphics':
## 
##     identify
library(forecast)
## 
## Attaching package: 'forecast'
## The following object is masked from 'package:aTSA':
## 
##     forecast
library(tseries)
## Registered S3 method overwritten by 'quantmod':
##   method            from
##   as.zoo.data.frame zoo
## 
## Attaching package: 'tseries'
## The following objects are masked from 'package:aTSA':
## 
##     adf.test, kpss.test, pp.test
# ===================== 1949-2008 完整货运量数据 =====================
data <- data.frame(
  year = c(1949,1950,1951,1952,1953,1954,1955,1956,1957,1958,
           1959,1960,1961,1962,1963,1964,1965,1966,1967,1968,
           1969,1970,1971,1972,1973,1974,1975,1976,1977,1978,
           1979,1980,1981,1982,1983,1984,1985,1986,1987,1988,
           1989,1990,1991,1992,1993,1994,1995,1996,1997,1998,
           1999,2000,2001,2002,2003,2004,2005,2006,2007,2008),
  
  freight = c(5589,9983,11083,12260,13780,14700,15900,17200,18500,19700,
              21300,22700,21500,20800,21800,23200,24900,26700,25400,23800,
              25700,27800,30100,32400,34800,36200,38600,39100,41800,44300,
              46800,49900,52600,55800,59300,63300,68300,71200,74800,79100,
              83500,87700,92400,97500,103600,111700,120000,129600,140700,153400,
              167900,184300,202700,223100,245600,270600,298500,329300,332500,330354)
)
# 查看数据（确认导入成功）
head(data)
##   year freight
## 1 1949    5589
## 2 1950    9983
## 3 1951   11083
## 4 1952   12260
## 5 1953   13780
## 6 1954   14700
tail(data)
##    year freight
## 55 2003  245600
## 56 2004  270600
## 57 2005  298500
## 58 2006  329300
## 59 2007  332500
## 60 2008  330354
# 基础版时序图
plot(data$year, data$freight,
     type = "l",        # 折线
     lwd = 3,           # 线条粗细
     col = "#2E86AB",   # 颜色
     main = "1949-2008年货运量时序图",
     xlab = "年份",
     ylab = "货运量",
     panel.first = grid())

# 加上数据点
points(data$year, data$freight, pch=19, col="darkred")

# 运行ADF检验
adf_result <- adf.test(data$freight) 
print(adf_result) 
## 
##  Augmented Dickey-Fuller Test
## 
## data:  data$freight
## Dickey-Fuller = -0.82912, Lag order = 3, p-value = 0.954
## alternative hypothesis: stationary
# 安全判断（避免p.value为空报错）
if (!is.null(adf_result$p.value) && adf_result$p.value < 0.05) {
  cat("\n结论：序列平稳\n")
} else {
  cat("\n结论：序列非平稳，需要差分处理\n")
}
## 
## 结论：序列非平稳，需要差分处理
#一阶差分处理
d_data <- diff(data$freight)
plot(d_data, type = "o", col = "red", main = "一阶差分后的绵羊数量序列")
grid()

# 差分后做ADF检验
adf_d <- adf.test(d_data)
print(adf_d)
## 
##  Augmented Dickey-Fuller Test
## 
## data:  d_data
## Dickey-Fuller = -2.3897, Lag order = 3, p-value = 0.4173
## alternative hypothesis: stationary
#计算二阶差分
d2_data <- diff(d_data, differences = 2)  # differences=2 就是二阶差分
#画二阶差分后的时序图（看是否平稳）
plot(d2_data, 
     type = "o",        # 线+点
     col = "steelblue", # 颜色
     lwd = 2,           # 线宽
     main = "二阶差分后时序图",
     xlab = "时间",
     ylab = "二阶差分结果",
     panel.first = grid())

# 查看自相关/偏自相关图，定阶
par(mfrow = c(1,2))
acf(d2_data, main = "差分序列的ACF图")
pacf(d2_data, main = "差分序列的PACF图")

par(mfrow = c(1,1))
#拟合模型
fit <- Arima(d2_data, order = c(1, 0, 1)) 
summary(fit)
## Series: d2_data 
## ARIMA(1,0,1) with non-zero mean 
## 
## Coefficients:
##          ar1      ma1      mean
##       0.1352  -1.0000  -16.2218
## s.e.  0.1347   0.0595   35.5667
## 
## sigma^2 = 16482364:  log likelihood = -554.84
## AIC=1117.69   AICc=1118.45   BIC=1125.86
## 
## Training set error measures:
##                    ME     RMSE      MAE MPE MAPE      MASE         ACF1
## Training set 295.0068 3951.566 1649.094 Inf  Inf 0.5101295 -0.005928472
print("ARIMA(1,0,1) 模型：")
## [1] "ARIMA(1,0,1) 模型："
print(fit)
## Series: d2_data 
## ARIMA(1,0,1) with non-zero mean 
## 
## Coefficients:
##          ar1      ma1      mean
##       0.1352  -1.0000  -16.2218
## s.e.  0.1347   0.0595   35.5667
## 
## sigma^2 = 16482364:  log likelihood = -554.84
## AIC=1117.69   AICc=1118.45   BIC=1125.86
#AIC 越小越好


# 绘制预测图
fore <- forecast(fit, h=5)
print(fore)
##    Point Forecast     Lo 80    Hi 80      Lo 95    Hi 95
## 58    4090.078504 -1157.247 9337.404  -3935.013 12115.17
## 59     539.019605 -6340.161 7418.200  -9981.780 11059.82
## 60      58.856283 -6846.572 6964.284 -10502.085 10619.80
## 61      -6.069933 -6911.977 6899.837 -10567.743 10555.60
## 62     -14.849057 -6920.765 6891.067 -10576.536 10546.84
plot(fore, main="1949-2008货运量 + 2009-2013预测", col="purple", lwd=2)
grid()

This is an R Markdown document. Markdown is a simple formatting syntax for authoring HTML, PDF, and MS Word documents. For more details on using R Markdown see http://rmarkdown.rstudio.com.

When you click the Knit button a document will be generated that includes both content as well as the output of any embedded R code chunks within the document. You can embed an R code chunk like this:

summary(cars)
##      speed           dist       
##  Min.   : 4.0   Min.   :  2.00  
##  1st Qu.:12.0   1st Qu.: 26.00  
##  Median :15.0   Median : 36.00
